notes: European standards body (CEN, paired with CENELEC for electrotechnical). Publishes EN standards including EN ISO/IEC adoptions and CEN-original standards. EN 18031 (consumer-product cybersecurity, mandated by EU RED Article 3.3) and the prEN AI Act technical standards are particularly relevant. Paywalled via national standards bodies (DIN, AFNOR, BSI, UNE, etc.).

match_nodes.description: EN 18031 — Common security requirements for radio equipment

data.official_name: EN 18031 - Common security requirements for radio equipment
data.notes: Paywalled. Three-part series harmonized to the EU Radio Equipment Directive Article 3(3) cybersecurity requirements. Mandatory for radio equipment placed on the EU market from August 2025.

examples.note: Part 3: Radio equipment for virtual money / financial value

data.notes: European editions of ISO/IEC standards. Technical content tracks the ISO master; cross-reference secid:control/iso.org/<n>.
